de.Error: the server could not build the ma: Fehler: Der Server konnte Karte/Radar nicht erstellen (kein Internet am Symcon-Server?).

en.🌧️ REGENRADAR – Karte mit Ortsnamen (Ope: 🌧️ RAIN RADAR – map with place names (OpenStreetMap) + DWD precipitation radar as animation. The Symcon server builds and embeds the images – the display device needs NO external internet access. (This instance does NOT create warnings.)
en.Ortsteil im Fokus (optional, z. B. Stadt: Locality in focus (optional, e.g. district/village within the municipality)
en.Film-Tempo: Millisekunden je Bild (klein: Film speed: milliseconds per frame (smaller = faster, e.g. 300)
en.Der ▶-Knopf in der Kachel erzeugt die Vo: The ▶ button in the tile always builds the forecast from the current time (DWD forecast radar, cloud movement) and plays it. Map: © OpenStreetMap contributors. Radar: DWD (maps.dwd.de). Locality search: Nominatim/OpenStreetMap.
en.Error: the server could not build the ma: Error: the server could not build the map/radar (no internet on the Symcon server?).
en.Nicht konfiguriert – bitte eine Gemeinde: Not configured – please select a municipality
